archetype_description: Objective, rigid, functional. The dashboard acts as a 'Command Center'. High contrast, monochrome base with strict color-coding for status (Green, Orange, Red). Minimalist and dense.

hierarchy.h2: text-sm sm:text-base font-medium tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-zinc-400

rules: No Inter for headings. Use Outfit for a geometric, technical feel.
Use IBM Plex Mono for financial numbers in tables to ensure tabular lining.
Never use bold for massive KPI numbers; use font-light with tight tracking.
Color is used exclusively for function (risk indication).
Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors with low opacity for status backgrounds.
Ensure all text against colored backgrounds meets minimum 4.5:1 contrast.

grid_system.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8

surface_strategy.description: Flat, dark surfaces with crisp 1px borders. No soft shadows. Elements should feel like precise instruments.

kpi_card.structure: Flex col, label top (overline), value middle (huge), meta bottom (small, colored by status).
kpi_card.styling: bg-zinc-900/40 border border-zinc-800 p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 rounded-lg

main_chart.styling: LineChart with distinct risk zones (ReferenceArea or gradient fills). Line color should be white. Use subtle CartesianGrid with stroke-dasharray. X-axis and Y-axis should use IBM Plex Mono.

scenario_toggle.styling: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-1 rounded-md flex gap-1

data_table.styling: Dense table. border-collapse. th: uppercase, text-xs, text-zinc-500, font-semibold. td: text-sm text-zinc-300 font-mono. Row hover: bg-zinc-800/30. Use color sparingly for positive/negative cashflows.

quick_add_form.styling: Compact vertical form. Inputs: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 text-sm. Button: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-white font-medium.

data_loading.style: Staggered fade-in for table rows (framer-motion). Number counting animation for KPIs.

rules: No images or lifestyle photography allowed. This is a pure data cockpit.

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to APCA guidelines. High contrast text on dark background.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (forms, toggles, table rows).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Outfit, Manrope, IBM Plex Mono via Google Fonts.
Install recharts for the projection chart.
Ensure the layout fits on a single screen (no scroll if possible, or minimal scroll) to meet 'dashboard must load directly' constraint.
Build the bento grid: Top row = 4 KPIs. Middle row = Chart (span 8) + Quick Add (span 4). Bottom row = Table (span 8) + Pressure Panel (span 4).
The scenario toggle should instantly update the chart and table data. Use React state to manage this.
For the chart, implement horizontal colored zones representing Safe (Green), Watch (Orange), and Danger (Red) thresholds to visualize risk.
